scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.check:codegen-stale: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen:generate && git diff --quiet lib/api-client-react/src/generated lib/api-zod/src/generated || (echo 'ERROR: Generated API client is stale. Run codegen:generate and commit the result.' && exit 1)
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen:generate && pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test:validation: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run test:validation && pnpm --filter @workspace/bathyscan run test:validation
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/kill-port-holders.mjs --e2e && node scripts/run-with-timeout.mjs e2e --label "playwright e2e" -- playwright test
scripts.check:mock-drift: pnpm --filter @workspace/bathyscan exec vitest run src/__tests__/apiClientMockSentinel.test.ts src/__tests__/clerkBypassMockSentinel.test.ts && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server exec vitest run src/__tests__/settings-schema-sync.test.ts src/__tests__/settings-coverage-sentinel.test.ts
